_comment: Shared configuration consumed by both the Python pipeline and the Remotion renderer. Edit this file, then run `make video` (or `bin/refresh.sh`) to regenerate.
_interp_doc: 'event-annual' (recommended): each school's cumulative score is anchored at events ∪ every December, then PCHIP-interpolated (monotone cubic Hermite). 'annual': only December milestones with plain linear interp. 'event-annual' fixes the 'phantom long-ramp' bug for schools that drop out of Top-N and re-enter much later.
_trackTopN_doc: How many ranks the snapshot script records per month. Must be >= displayTopN + ~10 for smooth boundary swaps.
_displayTopN_doc: How many rows the animation actually shows.
_smoothSigmaMonths_doc: Gaussian smoothing width on the rank trajectory. Smaller = snappier swaps, larger = more drifting motion.
_contestBadge_doc: Independent-clock asymmetric lifetimes (bottom-right stack). Each event has its own timer: a brief `leadMonths` anticipation fade-in, `holdMonths` of full prominence right after it happens, then a long elegant `fadeMonths` decay back to invisible. Same-month events (e.g. NOI/NOID类/NOIST in July) are nudged onto a `tieSpreadMonths` micro-spread so the stack has a deterministic order. The stack itself smoothly reflows as opacities change — no per-badge translate animation, the slot motion IS the entrance/exit.
